final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining technical concepts and their relationships for a tech education context.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration style, sketchy marker and pencil aesthetic, casual whiteboard explainer visual language
Subject: six interconnected tech concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — arranged as a concept map with simple icons for each term
Composition: top-down hierarchical layout with AI at the top as the umbrella concept, branching to sub-concepts below, clear visual connectors showing relationships
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light cream paper texture background, minimal distractions
Color palette: limited palette of 3-4 friendly colors (soft blue, warm orange, muted green) with black ink outlines, color used to group related concepts
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: Chinese characters must be legible at small sizes; icons must be simple line drawings; diagram must work in grayscale
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; complex 3D effects; excessive decoration; unreadable handwriting fonts; gradient overload
